title: I am trying to add a team member to an automation but they aren't in the dropdown box
excerpt:
I am trying to add an automation to a board and the team member I need to notify is not showing in the drop down box.

posts.author: michele1219 (Michele)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to add an automation to a board and the team member I need to notify is not showing in the drop down box.

The automation is “Every time period notify someone” and 2 of my team members are not showing in the team members list. I have checked and they are subscribed to the board.
